Explicit Interface Implementations

AuxiliaryFieldValues

A field value property set that maps field names to possible metadata values. These values take precedence over the metadata from the dataset.

virtual IPropertySet AuxiliaryFieldValues { get; set; }

Returns

IPropertySet

Examples

Sample Snippet

BuildPyramids

Indicates whether pyramids are built for each raster dataset associated with each selected catalog item.

virtual bool BuildPyramids { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

BuildThumbnail

Indicates whether items thumbnails are built and saved.

virtual bool BuildThumbnail { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Sample Snippet

The parameters used for defining cache of the selected mosaic dataset items.

virtual ICachedRasterFunctionArguments CacheParameters { get; set; }

Returns

The pyramid compression quality.

virtual int CompressionQuality { get; set; }

Returns

int

Sample Snippet

CompressionType

The pyramid compression type.

virtual esriRasterCompressionType CompressionType { get; set; }

Returns

esriRasterCompressionType

Examples

Sample Snippet

ComputeStatistics

Indicates whether histogram statistics are computed for each raster dataset associated with each selected catalog item.

virtual bool ComputeStatistics { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

DefaultSpatialReference

The default spatial reference used by all raster types for those dataset which do not have an associated native spatial reference.

virtual ISpatialReference DefaultSpatialReference { get; set; }

Returns

ISpatialReference

Examples

Sample Snippet

DefineCache

Indicates whether an attempt is made to define cache of the selected mosaic dataset items.

virtual bool DefineCache { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

DensificationFactor

The maximum segment length value as a factor of each incoming dataset fooprint's average dimension. Footprint polygon is densified only if the spatial reference of the footprint geometry differs form the spatial reference of the geometry column of the mosaic c

virtual double DensificationFactor { get; set; }

Returns

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

EstimateStatistics

Indicates whether the operation estimates statistics associated with the mosaic dataset and function templates.

virtual bool EstimateStatistics { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ExcludedFields

The collection of field names that are excluded from being updated during synchronization.

virtual IStringArray ExcludedFields { get; set; }

Returns

IStringArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

ForceDefaultSpatialReference

Indicates whether to overwrite the native spatial reference in a dataset with the one specified in the default spatial reference property.

virtual bool ForceDefaultSpatialReference { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

GeodataXform

The georefencing of the raster item.

virtual IGeodataXform GeodataXform { get; set; }

Returns

IGeodataXform

Sample Snippet

GeodataXformApplyMethod

The method used for applying the GeodataXform.

Returns

IgnoreValues

The ignore values for statistics.

virtual object IgnoreValues { get; set; }

Returns

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsDatasetReadOnly

Indicates whether the mosaic dataset is in read-only mode. Mosaic dataset operations do not perform write operations on a read-only mosaic.

virtual bool IsDatasetReadOnly { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

MaximumCellSizeFactor

The maximum visible pixel size factor.

virtual double MaximumCellSizeFactor { get; set; }

Returns

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

MaximumHighCellSize

The maximum allowed computed value for the high pixel size for the function raster dataset associated with a synchronized item. Lower values in this property indicate fewer pyramid levels. A value of zero indicates an absence of any constraints on the resultin

virtual double MaximumHighCellSize { get; set; }

Returns

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

MaximumPyramidLevel

The maximum number of pyramid levels to use from the function raster dataset associated with a synchronized item. A value of -1 indicates all available levels.

virtual int MaximumPyramidLevel { get; set; }

Returns

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

MinimumCellSizeFactor

The minimum visible pixel size factor.

virtual double MinimumCellSizeFactor { get; set; }

Returns

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

MinimumColumns

The minimum number of pixel columnns allowed at the top-most pyramid level in the function raster dataset associated with a synchronized item. Higher values in this property indicate fewer pyramid levels. A value of zero indicates an absence of any constraints

virtual int MinimumColumns { get; set; }

Returns

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

MinimumRows

The minimum number of pixel rows allowed at the top-most pyramid level in the function raster dataset associated with a synchronized item. Higher values in this property indicate fewer pyramid levels. A value of zero indicates an absence of any constraints on

virtual int MinimumRows { get; set; }

Returns

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

NumThreads

The number of parallel threads that execute parts of the associated operation.

virtual int NumThreads { get; set; }

Returns

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Parameters

All parameters associated with the mosaic dataset operation.

virtual IPropertySet Parameters { get; set; }

Returns

IPropertySet

Examples

Sample Snippet

PixelCacheCompression

The pixel cache compression type.

virtual esriRasterCompressionType PixelCacheCompression { get; set; }

Returns

esriRasterCompressionType

Examples

Sample Snippet

PixelCacheCompressionQuality

The pixel cache compression quality.

virtual int PixelCacheCompressionQuality { get; set; }

Returns

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

PixelCacheEnabled

Indicates whether to create and embed MRF as raster value.

virtual bool PixelCacheEnabled { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

PixelCacheLocation

The pixel cache location.

virtual string PixelCacheLocation { get; set; }

Returns

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

PrepareResults

Indicates whether the result associated with the mosaic dataset operation will be generated and made available in the Results property.

virtual bool PrepareResults { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Progressor

The external progressor object associated with the mosaic dataset operation.

virtual IProgressor Progressor { get; set; }

Returns

IProgressor

Examples

Sample Snippet

PyramidLevel

The number of pyramid levels.

virtual int PyramidLevel { get; set; }

Returns

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

PyramidResampleType

The method used for pyramid resampling.

virtual rstResamplingTypes PyramidResampleType { get; set; }

Returns

rstResamplingTypes

Examples

Sample Snippet

QueryFilter

The query filter applied on the selection set to identify the collection of catalog items on which to perform the associated operation. If no selection is specified, the query filter is applied on the entire catalog.

virtual IQueryFilter QueryFilter { get; set; }

Returns

IQueryFilter

Examples

Sample Snippet

RebuildDataSource

Indicates whether the original datasource added to the mosaic dataset will be rebuilt in order to update the metadata fields.

virtual bool RebuildDataSource { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

RecommendedNumThreads(ref int)

The number of parallel threads of execution recommended by the system.

virtual void RecommendedNumThreads(ref int pRecommendedNumThreads)

Parameters

pRecommendedNumThreads int

Examples

Sample Snippet

RefreshCache

Indicates whether an attempt is made to refresh the cache of the selected mosaic dataset items.

virtual bool RefreshCache { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

RefreshMensurationCapabilities

Indicates whether mensuration capabilities of the mosaic dataset is rebuilt using information stored in the function raster of selected items.

virtual bool RefreshMensurationCapabilities { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

RefreshMultidimensionalInfo

Indicates whether multidimensional info is rebuilt using applicable auxiliary fields (like Variable and Dimensions) from the mosaic catalog.

virtual bool RefreshMultidimensionalInfo { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

RemoveInvalidItems

Indicates whether items with category set to 'Incomplete' or items that cannot be rebuilt using their corresponding data sources are removed from the mosaic dataset.

virtual bool RemoveInvalidItems { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ResetVisibility

Indicates whether each selected item's visibility values (MinPS and MaxPS) are reset to null.

virtual bool ResetVisibility { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Results

The properties of the result associated with the mosaic dataset operation.

virtual IPropertySet Results { get; set; }

Returns

IPropertySet

Examples

Sample Snippet

SelectionSet

The selection set that identifies the collection of catalog items on which to perform the associated operation.

virtual ISelectionSet SelectionSet { get; set; }

Returns

ISelectionSet

Examples

Sample Snippet

ServerName

The URL to the server object name where parts of the operation may be remotely executed.

virtual string ServerName { get; set; }

Returns

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

SyncOnlyStaleItems

Indicates if only those items found to be stale are synchronized.

virtual bool SyncOnlyStaleItems { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ThumbnailBuilder

The thumbnail builder object associated with this operation. If not specified, a default builder is used for generating item thumbnails.

virtual IRasterThumbnailBuilder ThumbnailBuilder { get; set; }

Returns

IRasterThumbnailBuilder

Examples

Sample Snippet

UpdateExistingItems

Indicates whether mosaic dataset items are updated as part of the synchronization operation. Setting this property to false would ensure that no item is updated regardless of whether it is rebuilt. This property can be used in conjunction with the 'RemoveInval

virtual bool UpdateExistingItems { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

XSkipFactor

The X skip factor for statistics.

virtual int XSkipFactor { get; set; }

Returns

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

YSkipFactor

The Y skip factor for statistics.

virtual int YSkipFactor { get; set; }

Returns

int
